subject: [PATCH v7 1/3] mm: preserve PG_dropbehind flag during folio split

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Acked the patch, indicating approval without raising any concerns.

2026-05-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses a bug where the PG_dropbehind flag is lost during folio splits, leading to silent data loss and delayed writeback. The fix involves adding PG_dropbehind to the explicit allowlist in __split_folio_to_order().
